revised: 2026-06-02 — replanned per user: STOP the running build + WIPE the graph for a clean fresh rebuild (the explore-generated plan only did in-place remediation; user wants a from-scratch rebuild). Old LOE-003 'remediate without re-embed' dropped — superseded by full wipe+rebuild.
principles: HierarchicalNodeParser emitting all levels is correct; embed leaves only (canonical small-to-big; corroborated by NVIDIA GenerativeAIExamples notebook 04).
Parents stay stored (text + PARENT_OF) but UNEMBEDDED; Neo4j vector index auto-excludes null-embedding nodes.
Fresh start: stop the buggy all-levels run, wipe the graph, rebuild from scratch with the fix — no in-place patching.
EPAR scope (D1) determines rebuild ingestion size; resolve BEFORE launching the multi-hour rebuild to avoid a throwaway run.

open_decision.D1_epar_scope: RESOLVED 2026-06-02 — user chose KEEP EPARs. They are now in scope for the narrative retrieval corpus (CLAUDE.md + DECISIONS.md amended). => LOE-003 SKIPPED (no ingest filter); LOE-005 rebuilds the FULL ~80k corpus.

tasks.title: Embed leaf chunks only in the build path
acceptance_criteria: _embed_pass.flush() embeds ONLY ChunkNodes with properties.is_leaf == true
Parent (non-leaf) ChunkNodes still upserted (text + HAS_CHUNK/PARENT_OF) but carry NO embedding
ensure_chunk_vector_index dims taken from a LEAF embedding (not chs[0], which may now be a parent)
Rate logging still meaningful (log embedded-leaf count alongside total chunks); resume/idempotency preserved; ruff clean
tasks.notes: flush() embeds only is_leaf chunks; parents upserted with text, no embedding; vector index sized from a leaf vector. Live-verified on a 30-doc slice: 137/137 leaves embedded, 0 parent embeddings, retriever returns merged parent context.

tasks.title: Fresh full GPU rebuild (leaf-only, full ~80k incl. EPARs) + verify
tasks.notes: LAUNCHED 2026-06-02 07:50 (pid 463383, detached nohup, survives session end). Cmd: HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 .venv/bin/python -m harness.indexing.build --full --reset --embed-device cuda --flush-chunks 4000 --pause-every-docs 1000 --pause-seconds 60. reset=True wiped first. Leaf-only confirmed in log (e.g. 740 docs/8044 chunks/5558 leaf-embedded). GPU 251W@100%, 66C. Log: logs/build_full_20260602_075032.log (see logs/.latest_build_log). RESUME if it dies: same cmd WITHOUT --reset (skips docs with >=1 chunk). Verify + record counts when complete. | 2026-06-03: first run CRASHED at 46,864/80,083 docs (~59%) after ~15h — a 12.5MB EPAR RMP-summary PDF blew nltk punkt's recursion limit (fatal RecursionError in HierarchicalNodeParser). Hardened chunk_document to skip per-doc parser failures (guard+test). Relaunched in resume mode (pid 1854473); verified live it skipped the bad doc and continued. ~33k docs remain.
acceptance_criteria: Post-build: MATCH (c:Chunk {is_leaf:false}) WHERE c.embedding IS NOT NULL => 0; leaves all embedded; vector index covers leaves only
Retriever smoke on the rebuilt graph returns relevant, provenance-bearing parent context
Final counts (docs/leaf-chunks/parents/links_to) recorded in HISTORY.md + work unit 20

notes: Investigation in exploration.md (confirmed our-code bug, not the splitter; NVIDIA notebook corroborates leaf-only indexing). LOE-002+LOE-004 are unblocked now; LOE-003 + LOE-005 wait on the EPAR (D1) decision.
